heading: Affidavit requirements
label: 3006 Affidavit requirements
text: Any affidavit required of the United States by this chapter may be made on information and belief, if reliable and reasonably necessary, establishing with particularity, to the court’s satisfaction, facts supporting the claim of the United States.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to certain actions for debts owed the United States pending in court on that effective date, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1990section 3631 of Pub. L. 101–647section 3001 of this title
